name: awolfden-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for code review, commits, documentation, testing, and customer communication

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Performs comprehensive code reviews with security analysis, best practices, and improvement suggestions

plugins.name: commit-helper
plugins.description: Generates conventional commit messages based on staged changes with smart categorization

plugins.name: doc-generator
plugins.description: Automatically generates documentation for functions, classes, and modules

plugins.name: test-runner
plugins.description: Intelligently runs relevant tests based on code changes and provides failure analysis

plugins.name: brand-demo
plugins.description: Brand the SE demo app for a prospect company from their website URL
